summary: Enterprise customer Bravo Logistics Ltd. (CUST-002) reports via chat that webhook deliveries have been down for approximately 6 hours, blocking their entire logistics operation. Classified as a high-urgency bug report (confidence 0.95). This appears to be a confirmed service-impacting issue and may relate to an existing open ticket (TCK-0873) about webhook delivery delays. All relevant customer, policy, and SOP context was retrieved successfully; report confidence is high.
customer_context: CUST-002 is Bravo Logistics Ltd. (ops@bravologistics.example.com), an enterprise-tier customer with 41 months tenure. They hold an active Enterprise plan (250 seats, annual, $24,000/yr; ORD-7210). Past tickets include an OPEN bug report TCK-0873 ('Webhook deliveries delayed during peak hours', opened 2026-06-28) and a resolved feature request TCK-0512 (SSO via Okta). The currently reported webhook outage may be a continuation or escalation of TCK-0873.

suggested_actions.action: Send a first response acknowledging the webhook outage within 4 business hours per POL-SLA-001 (enterprise, high-urgency), and provide an initial status update.

Escalate this service-impacting webhook outage directly to the dedicated enterprise account team and to engineering per POL-ESCALATION-001, and per SOP-BUG-001 escalate confirmed service-impacting bugs to engineering.
Ensure engineering escalation is completed within 1 business day and schedule status updates at least every 48 hours while the ticket remains open, per POL-SLA-001.
Follow SOP-BUG-001: collect reproduction steps, affected environment, and impact scope, and check the known-issues list before filing a new engineering ticket.
Verify whether this outage is linked to the existing open ticket TCK-0873 (webhook delivery delays) and consolidate or cross-reference the tickets accordingly.

classification.reason: The customer reports webhook deliveries being down for 6 hours, indicating a broken service. This is service-impacting and blocking their business operation, warranting high urgency.
